channel.title: Left Fold
channel.description: A personal blog about programming topics I enjoy

item.title: Adopting Clojure in a Hostile Environment
item.description: Introducing Clojure and exploring to which degree we can use it to improve broken Java APIs

item.title: An Introduction to JVM Bytecode
item.description: Java, Kotlin, Scala, Clojure - They all compile to a language we rarely touch. Let's demystify it.
